name: proxy-deploy
description: Deployment scripts for the encrypted survey proxy

scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run zip
scripts.deploy:aws: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name gauteng-wellbeing-proxy --zip-file fileb://proxy.zip --region af-south-1
scripts.create:aws: aws lambda create-function --function-name gauteng-wellbeing-proxy --runtime nodejs18.x --role arn:aws:iam::YOUR_ACCOUNT:role/lambda-execution-role --handler server.handler --zip-file fileb://proxy.zip --region af-south-1
